body: PolicyEngine-UK 2.88.56 parameter snapshot for DfE program PE-parity surfaces. For 2026-01-01, PolicyEngine-UK sets DfE weeks_per_year to 38 and uses 52 weeks in WEEKS_IN_YEAR for weekly student-support formulas. Childcare funding rates are 11.891513647969255 from age 0, 8.775555526308862 from age 2, and 6.231916243320786 from age 3. Universal childcare entitlement hours are 570 per year. Targeted childcare entitlement hours are 570 per year and targeted age eligibility is false from age 0, true from age 2, and false from age 3. Extended childcare weekly hours are 0 from age 0, 30 from age 0.75, 30 from age 2, 30 from age 3, 30 from age 4, and 0 from age 5. Childcare Grant covers 85% of childcare expenses, capped weekly at 199.62 for one child and 342.24 for two or more children. Parents' Learning Allowance maximum is 2,024. Adult Dependants' Grant maximum is 3,545. Travel Grant subtracts an initial contribution of 303 and reduces awards above household income 39,796 at rate 0.1145475372279496. Disabled Students' Allowance maximum is 27,783. Care to Learn weekly maximum is 195 in London and 180 outside London. 16 to 19 Bursary vulnerable-group maximum is 1,200. Maintenance loan household-income threshold is 25,000 and higher threshold is 42,875. Maintenance loan standard maximums are 9,118 living with parents, 14,135 away in London, and 10,830 away outside London. Maintenance loan benefits maximums are 10,757 living with parents, 15,415 away in London, and 12,345 away outside London. Maintenance loan one-stage tapers are 6.54 living with parents, 6.36 away in London, and 6.47 away outside London. Maintenance loan first-stage benefits tapers are 4.088 living with parents, 4.37 away in London, and 4.179 away outside London. Maintenance loan second-stage benefits tapers are 6.54 living with parents, 6.36 away in London, and 6.47 away outside London. Maintenance loan standard floor rates are 0.44 living with parents, 0.498 away in London, and 0.466 away outside London. Maintenance loan benefits floor rates are 0.373 living with parents, 0.457 away in London, and 0.409 away outside London. The maintenance loan over-60 schedule applies from age 60 and uses reduction_per_pound 4.16, maximum_income 43,835, minimum_amount 50, and max_amount 4,582. The RuleSpec PE-parity surface uses nearest-pound rounding offset 0.5 before floor for nonnegative maintenance loan awards.
